:root{--global-palette1:#ce2045;--global-palette2:#161615;--global-palette3:#D03C74;--global-palette4:#000000;--global-palette5:#000000;--global-palette6:#F7F7F7;--global-palette7:#FFFFFF;--global-palette8:#FFFFFF;--global-palette9:#ffffff;--global-palette10:oklch(from var(--global-palette1) calc(l + 0.10 * (1 - l)) calc(c * 1.00) calc(h + 180) / 100%);--global-palette11:#13612e;--global-palette12:#1159af;--global-palette13:#b82105;--global-palette14:#f7630c;--global-palette15:#f5a524;--global-palette9rgb:255, 255, 255;--global-palette-highlight:var(--global-palette1);--global-palette-highlight-alt:var(--global-palette2);--global-palette-highlight-alt2:var(--global-palette9);--global-palette-btn-bg:var(--global-palette1);--global-palette-btn-bg-hover:var(--global-palette2);--global-palette-btn:var(--global-palette9);--global-palette-btn-hover:var(--global-palette9);--global-palette-btn-sec-bg:var(--global-palette7);--global-palette-btn-sec-bg-hover:var(--global-palette2);--global-palette-btn-sec:var(--global-palette3);--global-palette-btn-sec-hover:var(--global-palette9);--global-body-font-family:Montserrat, sans-serif;--global-heading-font-family:Montserrat, sans-serif;--global-primary-nav-font-family:var(--global-body-font-family, inherit);--global-fallback-font:sans-serif;--global-display-fallback-font:sans-serif;--global-content-width:1400px;--global-content-wide-width:calc(1400px + 230px);--global-content-narrow-width:842px;--global-content-edge-padding:1.5rem;--global-content-boxed-padding:0rem;--global-calc-content-width:calc(1400px - var(--global-content-edge-padding) - var(--scrollbar-offset)));}body{background:var(--global-palette8);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;}body, input, select, optgroup, textarea{font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;font-family:var(--global-body-font-family);color:var(--global-palette2);}.content-bg, body.content-style-unboxed .site{background:var(--global-palette9);}h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6{font-family:var(--global-heading-font-family);}h1{font-style:normal;font-weight:400;font-size:60px;line-height:1.5;font-family:var(--global-heading-font-family, inherit);color:var(--global-palette2);}h2{font-style:normal;font-weight:400;font-size:24px;line-height:1.5;font-family:var(--global-heading-font-family, inherit);color:var(--global-palette2);}h3{font-style:normal;font-weight:400;font-size:24px;line-height:1.5;font-family:var(--global-heading-font-family, inherit);color:var(--global-palette2);}h4{font-style:normal;font-weight:400;font-size:22px;line-height:1.5;font-family:var(--global-heading-font-family, inherit);color:var(--global-palette2);}h5{font-style:normal;font-weight:400;font-size:20px;line-height:1.5;font-family:var(--global-heading-font-family, inherit);color:var(--global-palette2);}h6{font-style:normal;font-weight:400;font-size:18px;line-height:1.5;font-family:var(--global-heading-font-family, inherit);color:var(--global-palette2);}.entry-hero .kadence-breadcrumbs{max-width:1400px;}.site-container, .site-header-row-layout-contained, .site-footer-row-layout-contained, .entry-hero-layout-contained, .comments-area, .alignfull > .wp-block-cover__inner-container, .alignwide > .wp-block-cover__inner-container{max-width:var(--global-content-width);}.content-width-narrow .content-container.site-container, .content-width-narrow .hero-container.site-container{max-width:var(--global-content-narrow-width);}@media all and (min-width: 1630px){.wp-site-blocks .content-container  .alignwide{margin-left:-115px;margin-right:-115px;width:unset;max-width:unset;}}@media all and (min-width: 1102px){.content-width-narrow .wp-site-blocks .content-container .alignwide{margin-left:-130px;margin-right:-130px;width:unset;max-width:unset;}}.content-style-boxed .wp-site-blocks .entry-content .alignwide{margin-left:calc( -1 * var( --global-content-boxed-padding ) );margin-right:calc( -1 * var( --global-content-boxed-padding ) );}.content-area{margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}@media all and (max-width: 1024px){.content-area{margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){.content-area{margin-top:0rem;margin-bottom:0rem;}}@media all and (max-width: 1024px){:root{--global-content-boxed-padding:0rem;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){:root{--global-content-boxed-padding:1.5rem;}}.entry-content-wrap{padding:0rem;}@media all and (max-width: 1024px){.entry-content-wrap{padding:0rem;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){.entry-content-wrap{padding:1.5rem;}}.entry.single-entry{box-shadow:0px 15px 15px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);}.entry.loop-entry{box-shadow:0px 15px 15px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);}.loop-entry .entry-content-wrap{padding:2rem;}@media all and (max-width: 1024px){.loop-entry .entry-content-wrap{padding:2rem;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){.loop-entry .entry-content-wrap{padding:1.5rem;}}button, .button, .wp-block-button__link, input[type="button"], input[type="reset"], input[type="submit"], .fl-button, .elementor-button-wrapper .elementor-button, .wc-block-components-checkout-place-order-button, .wc-block-cart__submit{border-radius:50px;padding:10px 40px 10px 40px;box-shadow:0px 0px 0px -7px rgba(0,0,0,0);}.wp-block-button.is-style-outline .wp-block-button__link{padding:10px 40px 10px 40px;}button:hover, button:focus, button:active, .button:hover, .button:focus, .button:active, .wp-block-button__link:hover, .wp-block-button__link:focus, .wp-block-button__link:active, input[type="button"]:hover, input[type="button"]:focus, input[type="button"]:active, input[type="reset"]:hover, input[type="reset"]:focus, input[type="reset"]:active, input[type="submit"]:hover, input[type="submit"]:focus, input[type="submit"]:active, .elementor-button-wrapper .elementor-button:hover, .elementor-button-wrapper .elementor-button:focus, .elementor-button-wrapper .elementor-button:active, .wc-block-cart__submit:hover{box-shadow:0px 15px 25px -7px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);}.kb-button.kb-btn-global-outline.kb-btn-global-inherit{padding-top:calc(10px - 2px);padding-right:calc(40px - 2px);padding-bottom:calc(10px - 2px);padding-left:calc(40px - 2px);}@media all and (min-width: 1025px){.transparent-header .entry-hero .entry-hero-container-inner{padding-top:calc(0px + 0px);}}@media all and (max-width: 1024px){.mobile-transparent-header .entry-hero .entry-hero-container-inner{padding-top:40px;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){.mobile-transparent-header .entry-hero .entry-hero-container-inner{padding-top:65px;}}#kt-scroll-up-reader, #kt-scroll-up{border:1px solid currentColor;border-radius:62px 62px 62px 62px;color:var(--global-palette7);background:var(--global-palette5);border-color:var(--global-palette5);bottom:30px;font-size:1.2em;padding:0.4em 0.4em 0.4em 0.4em;}#kt-scroll-up-reader.scroll-up-side-right, #kt-scroll-up.scroll-up-side-right{right:30px;}#kt-scroll-up-reader.scroll-up-side-left, #kt-scroll-up.scroll-up-side-left{left:30px;}@media all and (max-width: 1024px){#kt-scroll-up-reader, #kt-scroll-up{bottom:20px;}#kt-scroll-up-reader.scroll-up-side-right, #kt-scroll-up.scroll-up-side-right{right:20px;}#kt-scroll-up-reader.scroll-up-side-left, #kt-scroll-up.scroll-up-side-left{left:20px;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){#kt-scroll-up-reader, #kt-scroll-up{bottom:10px;}#kt-scroll-up-reader.scroll-up-side-right, #kt-scroll-up.scroll-up-side-right{right:10px;}#kt-scroll-up-reader.scroll-up-side-left, #kt-scroll-up.scroll-up-side-left{left:10px;}}.page-hero-section .entry-hero-container-inner{background:var(--global-palette6);}.entry-hero.page-hero-section .entry-header{min-height:200px;}.entry-author-style-center{padding-top:var(--global-md-spacing);border-top:1px solid var(--global-gray-500);}.entry-author-style-center .entry-author-avatar, .entry-meta .author-avatar{display:none;}.entry-author-style-normal .entry-author-profile{padding-left:0px;}#comments .comment-meta{margin-left:0px;}.loop-entry.type-post h2.entry-title{font-style:normal;font-size:30px;line-height:1;color:var(--global-palette4);}
/* Kadence Header CSS */
.wp-site-blocks #mobile-header{display:block;}.wp-site-blocks #main-header{display:none;}@media all and (min-width: 1200px){.wp-site-blocks #mobile-header{display:none;}.wp-site-blocks #main-header{display:block;}}@media all and (max-width: 1199px){.mobile-transparent-header #masthead{position:absolute;left:0px;right:0px;z-index:100;}.kadence-scrollbar-fixer.mobile-transparent-header #masthead{right:var(--scrollbar-offset,0);}.mobile-transparent-header #masthead, .mobile-transparent-header .site-top-header-wrap .site-header-row-container-inner, .mobile-transparent-header .site-main-header-wrap .site-header-row-container-inner, .mobile-transparent-header .site-bottom-header-wrap .site-header-row-container-inner{background:transparent;}.site-header-row-tablet-layout-fullwidth, .site-header-row-tablet-layout-standard{padding:0px;}}@media all and (min-width: 1200px){.transparent-header #masthead{position:absolute;left:0px;right:0px;z-index:100;}.transparent-header.kadence-scrollbar-fixer #masthead{right:var(--scrollbar-offset,0);}.transparent-header #masthead, .transparent-header .site-top-header-wrap .site-header-row-container-inner, .transparent-header .site-main-header-wrap .site-header-row-container-inner, .transparent-header .site-bottom-header-wrap .site-header-row-container-inner{background:transparent;}}.site-branding a.brand img{max-width:240px;}.site-branding a.brand img.svg-logo-image{width:240px;}@media all and (max-width: 1199px){.site-branding a.brand img{max-width:180px;}.site-branding a.brand img.svg-logo-image{width:180px;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){.site-branding a.brand img{max-width:150px;}.site-branding a.brand img.svg-logo-image{width:150px;}}.site-branding{padding:0px 0px 0px 0px;}@media all and (max-width: 1199px){.site-branding{padding:10px 0px 0px 0px;}}@media all and (max-width: 767px){.site-branding{padding:5px 0px 0px 0px;}}#masthead, #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start):not(.site-header-row-container):not(.site-main-header-wrap), #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) > .site-header-row-container-inner{background:linear-gradient(110deg,var(--global-palette3,#D03C74) 5%,rgb(218,24,123) 81%,rgb(231,69,129) 100%);}@media all and (max-width: 767px){#masthead, #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start):not(.site-header-row-container):not(.site-main-header-wrap), #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) > .site-header-row-container-inner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(138,11,110) 0%,rgb(218,24,123) 79%,rgb(231,69,129) 100%);}}.site-main-header-wrap .element-contact-inner-wrap .header-contact-item .kadence-svg-iconset{font-size:1em;}#main-header .header-button2{font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;font-size:16px;border-radius:50px 50px 50px 50px;color:var(--global-palette8);border:1px solid currentColor;border-color:var(--global-palette8);box-shadow:0px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0);}#main-header .header-button2.button-size-custom{padding:7px 16px 7px 16px;}#main-header .header-button2:hover{color:var(--global-palette8);border-color:var(--global-palette7);box-shadow:0px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);}#masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) .header-button2, #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) .mobile-header-button-wrap .mobile-header-button2{color:var(--global-palette7);border-color:var(--global-palette2);}#masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) .header-button2:hover, #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) .mobile-header-button-wrap .mobile-header-button2:hover{color:var(--global-palette7);border-color:var(--global-palette2);}.mobile-header-button2-wrap .mobile-header-button-inner-wrap .mobile-header-button2{font-style:normal;font-weight:800;color:var(--global-palette9);background:var(--global-palette1);border:1px solid currentColor;box-shadow:0px 0px 0px -7px rgba(0,0,0,0);}.mobile-header-button2-wrap .mobile-header-button-inner-wrap .mobile-header-button2:hover{color:var(--global-palette8);background:var(--global-palette1);box-shadow:0px 15px 25px -7px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);}#widget-drawer.popup-drawer-layout-fullwidth .drawer-content .header-widget2, #widget-drawer.popup-drawer-layout-sidepanel .drawer-inner{max-width:400px;}#widget-drawer.popup-drawer-layout-fullwidth .drawer-content .header-widget2{margin:0 auto;}.widget-toggle-open{display:flex;align-items:center;background:transparent;box-shadow:none;}.widget-toggle-open:hover, .widget-toggle-open:focus{border-color:currentColor;background:transparent;box-shadow:none;}.widget-toggle-open .widget-toggle-icon{display:flex;}.widget-toggle-open .widget-toggle-label{padding-right:5px;}.rtl .widget-toggle-open .widget-toggle-label{padding-left:5px;padding-right:0px;}.widget-toggle-open .widget-toggle-label:empty, .rtl .widget-toggle-open .widget-toggle-label:empty{padding-right:0px;padding-left:0px;}.widget-toggle-open-container .widget-toggle-open{color:var(--global-palette5);padding:0.4em 0.6em 0.4em 0.6em;font-size:14px;}.widget-toggle-open-container .widget-toggle-open.widget-toggle-style-bordered{border:1px solid currentColor;}.widget-toggle-open-container .widget-toggle-open .widget-toggle-icon{font-size:20px;}.widget-toggle-open-container .widget-toggle-open:hover, .widget-toggle-open-container .widget-toggle-open:focus{color:var(--global-palette-highlight);}#widget-drawer .header-widget-2style-normal a:not(.button){text-decoration:underline;}#widget-drawer .header-widget-2style-plain a:not(.button){text-decoration:none;}#widget-drawer .header-widget2 .widget-title{color:var(--global-palette9);}#widget-drawer .header-widget2{color:var(--global-palette8);}#widget-drawer .header-widget2 a:not(.button), #widget-drawer .header-widget2 .drawer-sub-toggle{color:var(--global-palette8);}#widget-drawer .header-widget2 a:not(.button):hover, #widget-drawer .header-widget2 .drawer-sub-toggle:hover{color:var(--global-palette9);}#mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li{font-size:14px;}#mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li a{padding-top:1em;padding-bottom:1em;}#mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li > a, #mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li.menu-item-has-children > .drawer-nav-drop-wrap{color:var(--global-palette8);}#mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li.current-menu-item > a, #mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li.current-menu-item.menu-item-has-children > .drawer-nav-drop-wrap{color:var(--global-palette-highlight);}#mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li.menu-item-has-children .drawer-nav-drop-wrap, #mobile-secondary-site-navigation ul li:not(.menu-item-has-children) a{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}#mobile-secondary-site-navigation:not(.drawer-navigation-parent-toggle-true) ul li.menu-item-has-children .drawer-nav-drop-wrap button{border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
/* Kadence Pro Header CSS */
#filter-drawer.popup-drawer-layout-fullwidth .drawer-content .product-filter-widgets, #filter-drawer.popup-drawer-layout-sidepanel .drawer-inner{max-width:400px;}#filter-drawer.popup-drawer-layout-fullwidth .drawer-content .product-filter-widgets{margin:0 auto;}.filter-toggle-open-container{margin-right:0.5em;}.filter-toggle-open >*:first-child:not(:last-child){margin-right:4px;}.filter-toggle-open{color:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;background:transparent;box-shadow:none;border-radius:0px;}.filter-toggle-open.filter-toggle-style-default{border:0px;}.filter-toggle-open:hover, .filter-toggle-open:focus{border-color:currentColor;background:transparent;color:inherit;box-shadow:none;}.filter-toggle-open .filter-toggle-icon{display:flex;}.filter-toggle-open >*:first-child:not(:last-child):empty{margin-right:0px;}.filter-toggle-open-container .filter-toggle-open{color:var(--global-palette5);padding:3px 5px 3px 5px;font-size:14px;}.filter-toggle-open-container .filter-toggle-open.filter-toggle-style-bordered{border:1px solid currentColor;}.filter-toggle-open-container .filter-toggle-open .filter-toggle-icon{font-size:20px;}.filter-toggle-open-container .filter-toggle-open:hover, .filter-toggle-open-container .filter-toggle-open:focus{color:var(--global-palette-highlight);}#filter-drawer .drawer-inner{background:var(--global-palette9);}#filter-drawer .drawer-header .drawer-toggle, #filter-drawer .drawer-header .drawer-toggle:focus{color:var(--global-palette5);}#filter-drawer .drawer-header .drawer-toggle:hover, #filter-drawer .drawer-header .drawer-toggle:focus:hover{color:var(--global-palette3);}#filter-drawer .header-filter-2style-normal a:not(.button){text-decoration:underline;}#filter-drawer .header-filter-2style-plain a:not(.button){text-decoration:none;}#filter-drawer .drawer-inner .product-filter-widgets .widget-title{color:var(--global-palette3);}#filter-drawer .drawer-inner .product-filter-widgets{color:var(--global-palette4);}#filter-drawer .drawer-inner .product-filter-widgets a:not(.kb-button) .drawer-inner .product-filter-widgets .drawer-sub-toggle{color:var(--global-palette1);}#filter-drawer .drawer-inner .product-filter-widgets a:hover:not(.kb-button), #filter-drawer .drawer-inner .product-filter-widgets .drawer-sub-toggle:hover{color:var(--global-palette2);}.kadence-shop-active-filters{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;}.kadence-clear-filters-container a{text-decoration:none;background:var(--global-palette7);color:var(--global-palette5);padding:.6em;font-size:80%;transition:all 0.3s ease-in-out;-webkit-transition:all 0.3s ease-in-out;-moz-transition:all 0.3s ease-in-out;}.kadence-clear-filters-container ul{margin:0px;padding:0px;border:0px;list-style:none outside;overflow:hidden;zoom:1;}.kadence-clear-filters-container ul li{float:left;padding:0 0 1px 1px;list-style:none;}.kadence-clear-filters-container a:hover{background:var(--global-palette9);color:var(--global-palette3);}
/*# sourceURL=kadence-global-inline-css */

#encash_form_success_info{}.fp_rs_display_free_product h3 {
                                            display:block;
					}
                                        .fb_edge_widget_with_comment span.fb_edge_comment_widget iframe.fb_ltr {
                                            display: none !important;
                                        }
                                        .fb-like{
                                            height: 20px !important;
                                            overflow: hidden !important;
                                        }
										.srp_social_action_buttons .srp_tooltip_for_social_action {
											background-color: #000;
                                            color: #fff;
										}
                                        .points_empty_error, 
                                        .points_number_error, 
                                        .points_greater_than_earnpoints_error,
                                        .points_lesser_than_minpoints_error,
                                        .reason_empty_error,
                                        .paypal_email_empty_error,
                                        .paypal_email_format_error,
                                        .recaptcha_empty_error,
                                        .encash_form_success_info{
                                            display:none;
                                        }
                                        .referral_field{
                                            margin-top:40px;
                                        }
                                        .referral_field_title{
                                            text-align:center;
                                        }
                                        .rs_social_sharing_buttons {
                                            display: inline;
                                        }
                                        .twitter-share-button,
                                        .vk-like{
                                            width:88px;
                                        }
                                        .ok-share-button{
                                            width:30px;
                                        }
                                        .fp-srp-point-price-label{
                                            margin-left:10px;
                                        }
                                        .referral_field1{
                                            margin-top:10px;
                                        }
                                        .rs_alert_div_for_copy{
                                            display:none;
                                        }
                                        .rs_warning_message{
                                            display:inline-block;
                                            color:red;
                                        }
                                        .rs_redeem_voucher_error{
                                            color:red;
                                        }
                                        .rs_redeem_voucher_success{
                                            color:green;
                                        }
                                        .gifticon{
                                            width:16px;height:16px;
                                            display:inline;
                                        }
                                        .rs_variable_earn_messages{
                                            display:none;
                                        }
                                        .simpleshopmessage{
                                            width:16px;height:16px;
                                            display:inline;
                                        }
                                        .gift_icon{
                                            width:16px;height:16px;
                                            display:inline;
                                        }
                                        .variationrewardpoints,
                                        .variationreferralpoints,
                                        .variationpoint_price,
                                        .variationrewardpointsamount,
                                        .variationreferralpointsamount{
                                            display:inline-block;
                                        }
                                        .iagreeerror{
                                            display:none;
                                        }
                                        .fp-srp-send-point{
                                            border:none;
                                            padding: 6px 10px 6px 10px;
                                        }
                                        .fp-srp-send-point-value{
                                            min-width:250px !important;
                                            height:30px !important;
                                        }
                                        .fp-srp-point-price {
                                            margin-left: 5px;
                                        }
                                        .fp-srp-email-content{
                                            border: 1px solid #000;
                                            border-collapse: collapse;
                                        }
                                        .fp-srp-email-content-title{
                                            background: black;
                                            color:#fff;
                                        }
/*# sourceURL=fp-srp-inline-style-inline-css */
</style>

	<style id="kadence-blocks-post-custom-css">.kb-advanced-slider-162379_b68e14-f2 .kb-advanced-slide-inner-wrap {
    padding-right: 0px !important;
    padding-left: 0px !important;
}
/* Product loop Styling */
.RDHomeProd ul.products li.product {
	box-shadow:none !important;
}
.RDHomeProd .products li img{
	height:200px !important;
	object-fit: contain;
}
.RDHomeProd .product-archive li .product-details {
	text-align:left;
}
.RDHomeProd .products li .product-details h2.woocommerce-loop-product__title {
	display: block;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow: hidden;
  max-height: 3.4em;
  line-height: 1.4em;
	overflow: hidden;
   text-overflow: ellipsis;
   display: -webkit-box;
   -webkit-line-clamp: 2; /* number of lines to show */
           line-clamp: 2;
   -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
	margin-bottom:10px !important;
	color:#000000 !important;
	text-transform:uppercase;
}
.RDHomeProd .products li .product-details del{
	font-size:17px;
}
.RDHomeProd .products li .product-action-wrap {
	display:none;
}

/* Homepage info cards */
.RDHomeInfo1 .kt-blocks-info-box-link-wrap{
background: #12c2e9;  /* fallback for old browsers */
background: -webkit-linear-gradient(to right, #f64f59, #c471ed, #12c2e9);  /* Chrome 10-25, Safari 5.1-6 */
background: linear-gradient(to right, #f64f59, #c471ed, #12c2e9); /* W3C, IE 10+/ Edge, Firefox 16+, Chrome 26+, Opera 12+, Safari 7+ */
}
.RDHomeInfo2 .kt-blocks-info-box-link-wrap{
background: #FC466B;  /* fallback for old browsers */
background: -webkit-linear-gradient(to right, #3F5EFB, #FC466B);  /* Chrome 10-25, Safari 5.1-6 */
background: linear-gradient(to right, #3F5EFB, #FC466B); /* W3C, IE 10+/ Edge, Firefox 16+, Chrome 26+, Opera 12+, Safari 7+ */
}

/* Homepage Category Grids */
.RDHomeCatGrid ul.products li.product .woocommerce-loop-category__title .count, .RDHomeCatGrid2 ul.products li.product .woocommerce-loop-category__title .count{
    display: none;
}
.RDHomeCatGrid ul.products li.product .woocommerce-loop-category__title, .RDHomeCatGrid2 ul.products li.product .woocommerce-loop-category__title{
	text-align:center !important;
}
.RDHomeCatGrid ul.products li.product img {
	border-radius:200px;
	width:238px !important;
	object-fit:cover;
}
.RDHomeCatGrid2 ul.products li.product img {
	border-radius:200px;
	height:192px !important;
	object-fit:cover;
}
.RDHomeCatGrid ul.products li.product, .RDHomeCatGrid2 ul.products li.product {
	box-shadow:none !important;
}
#New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product *,
#Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product * 
{
	line-height: normal;
	word-break: normal;
}
#New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product .product-details .woocommerce-loop-product__title,
#Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product .product-details .woocommerce-loop-product__title
{
	font-weight:400;
	max-height: none;
	text-transform: none;
	overflow: visible;
    text-overflow: clip;
	-webkit-line-clamp: initial;
    line-clamp: inherit;
}
body #New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price .zen-product-vip-price-display  bdi,
body #Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price .zen-product-vip-price-display  bdi,
body #New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price .zen-product-non-vip-price-display bdi,
body #Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price .zen-product-non-vip-price-display bdi
{
    font-size: 30px;
}
#New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price del,
#Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price del
{
	font-size: 16px;
	margin-top: 8px;
}
#New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product .sale_p:not(.zen-product-vip-price-display),
#Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product .sale_p:not(.zen-product-vip-price-display)
{
	margin-top: 8px;
	color: var(--global-palette-highlight,#de0000);
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
}
#New-Arrivals ul.products li.product .sale_p ins,
#Best-Selling ul.products li.product .sale_p ins
{
    font-weight: 700;
}
#New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price del,
#Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price del
{
	opacity: 1;
}
#New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price .msrp,
#Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products li.product .price .msrp
{
	margin-top: 8px;
}
#New-Arrivals .woocommerce ul.products.woo-archive-btn-button li.product .price,
#Best-Selling .woocommerce ul.products.woo-archive-btn-button li.product .price
{
	margin-bottom: 0;
}
</style><style>
/* Only the very top March Madness bar */
.march-top-flash {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* keep text above the flash */
.march-top-flash > * {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

/* slower light sweep */
.march-top-flash::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -160%;
    width: 22%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 1;
    opacity: 0.75;
    background: linear-gradient(
        115deg,
        rgba(255,255,255,0) 0%,
        rgba(255,255,255,0.00) 35%,
        rgba(255,255,255,0.38) 50%,
        rgba(255,255,255,0.00) 65%,
        rgba(255,255,255,0) 100%
    );
    transform: skewX(-22deg);
    animation: marchTopFlashSweep 20s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes marchTopFlashSweep {
    0%   { left: -160%; }
    70%  { left: -160%; }
    82%  { left: 160%; }
    100% { left: 160%; }
}

		<style id="wp-custom-css">
			.zen-custom-checkout .zen-privacy-policy{
	margin-left: 0 !important;
	margin-right: 0 !important;
	width: 100% !important;
}
.single-entry .entry-header.post-title {
	padding:10px;
}

h2{ font-weight:400 !important;}

.sale_p, .sale_p ins, .price ins {
	font-size:16px !important;
	font-weight:400 !important;
	color:#333 !important;
}
.price del .woocommerce-Price-amount bdi{
	color:#666 !important;
}
.zen-product-vip-price-display-price bdi{
	font-size:30px !important;
}
.zen-product-non-vip-price-display ins{
	font-weight:bold !important;
}
#main-header .header-button{
	white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Age Gate Popup */
.age-gate{border-radius: 20px!important;}

.age-gate-form, .age-gate__form{height:auto;}

.woocommerce ul#shipping_method li{
	flex-wrap: nowrap
}
.bundle_sells_title h3 strong{
	display: block;
}
/* Homepage Catergory Slider */
.RDCatSlider .kb-gallery-image-contain{
	background: rgb(223,141,216);
background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(223,141,216,1) 0%, rgba(120,203,221,1) 100%) !important;
}
.RDCatSlider .kb-gallery-image-contain:hover{
	background: rgb(223,141,216);
background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(223,141,216,1) 0%, rgba(120,203,221,1) 100%) !important;
}
.RDCatSlider .kb-gallery-image-contain img{
	transform:scale(0.8);
}
.RDCatSlider .kadence-blocks-gallery-item__caption{
	font-weight:500 !important;
}
#Most-Popular img{
	border-radius:30px !important;
}

/* Landing Page Category Grid */
.RDLandingCatGrid h2{
	text-align:center;
}
.RDLandingCatGrid .count{
	display:none;
}
.RDLandingCatGrid .entry.loop-entry{
	box-shadow:none;
}
.RDLandingCatGrid .product-details{
	padding-left:0px !important;
	padding-right:0px !important;
}
.RDLandingCatGrid .grid-cols{
	column-gap:20px;
}
.RDLandingCatGrid .product-category img, .product-category img {
	border-radius:300px !important;
	background: rgb(223,141,216);
background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(223,141,216,1) 0%, rgba(120,203,221,1) 100%) !important;
	padding:15px;
}
.RDLandingCatGrid .product-category img:hover, .product-category img:hover {
	border-radius:300px !important;
	background: rgb(223,141,216);
background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(223,141,216,1) 0%, rgba(120,203,221,1) 100%) !important;
	padding:15px;
}
.RDLandingCatGrid li, .RDLandingCatGrid .product-details{
	background:none !important;
	font-weight:500 !important;
}

/* 1 Hour Delivery Banner on Product Grid */
#Best-Sellers .zen-store-locator-one-hour-indicator{
	font-size:13px;
}


/* Main menu STAR icon */
.RDStarIcon svg{
	color:#ffc107 !important;
}

.transparent-header #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) .header-button2,
.non-transparent-header #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed .header-button2{
    //background-color: var(--global-palette1);
    filter: contrast(0) brightness(0);
}
.transparent-header #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) .header-html .saturated-image,
.non-transparent-header #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed .header-html .saturated-image{
    filter: contrast(0) brightness(0.5);
}

/* Mobile Header */
.mobile-header-button{
	padding: 10px 15px 10px 15px !important
}
.mobile-html-inner a span{
	font-size:14px !important;
}
.mobile-html-inner a span svg{
	width:16px !important;
}
.mobile-html-inner #zen-store-locator-header-form{
	margin:0;
	border:solid 1px #000;
	border-radius:30px;
	padding-right:10px;
}
.mobile-html-inner p{
	display:none;
}
#post-162379 .entry-content-wrap{
	padding-top:0;
}
#mobile-header .site-header-top-section-left{
	width:10px;
}
#mobile-header .site-header-top-section-center{
	justify-content:left !important;
}

/* Product Grid */
.products .product img{
	max-height:250px !important;
	object-fit:contain;
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 600px){
	.products .product, .zen-agency-product, .products .product .product-details{
		padding:5px !important;
	}
	.zen-store-locator-one-hour-standard,
	.zen-store-locator-one-hour-indicator{
		background-image:none !important;
		padding:3px !important;
	}
}

/* Best Sellers Tab Styling */
.RDBestSellerTabs .kt-tab-title-active a{
	background: rgb(223,141,216);
background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(223,141,216,1) 0%, rgba(120,203,221,1) 100%) !important;
}
.RDBestSellerTabs .kt-tab-title-inactive a:hover{
	background: rgb(223,141,216);
background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(223,141,216,1) 0%, rgba(120,203,221,1) 100%) !important;
}

/* Homepage Mobile Width Fix */
@media only screen and (max-width: 600px){
	.RDHomeMobileWidthFix{
		max-width:100% !important;
		margin:auto 0 !important;
	}
}

.wp-block-cover{
	display:block !important;
}

/* Category Grids */
.RDHomeCatGrid .products.align-buttons-bottom li.product{
	margin: 0 auto !important;
}

/* Product Questions */
.QA{
	background:#CE2045 !important;
	font-family: 'Montserrat' !important;
	border-radius:30px 30px 0 0  !important;
	padding:15px !important;
	font-size:18px !important;
}
#question{
	border-radius:30px !important;
}
.qa-data {
	border-radius:0 30px 30px 30px !important;
}

/* Age Gate Popup Styling 12-3-2024 STT */

.age-gate { background-image: url(https://romanticdepot.com/store/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/age-gate-gradien.png) !important;
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center center;
    background-attachment: scroll;
background-repeat: no-repeat;}

.age-gate__additional-information p {
    font-size: 14px !important;
	  display: block;
    margin-block-start: 0em !important;
    margin-block-end: 0em !important;
    margin-inline-start: 0px;
    margin-inline-end: 0px;
    unicode-bidi: isolate;
}

/* Homepage button pulse */
.pulse-button{
	-webkit-animation: pulsate 2s infinite ease-out;
}
.pulse-button:hover{
	-webkit-animation:none;
}
@-webkit-keyframes pulsate {
    0% {-webkit-transform: scale(0.85); }
    70% {-webkit-transform: scale(1);
	box-shadow: 0 0 0 20px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
	}
    100% {-webkit-transform: scale(0.85);
	box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0);}}
@media only screen and (max-width: 600px){
	@-webkit-keyframes pulsate {
    0% {-webkit-transform: scale(0.9); }
    70% {-webkit-transform: scale(1);
	box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
	}
    100% {-webkit-transform: scale(0.9);
	box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0);}}
}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product a img.zen-price-match-icon{width: 40px !important}

.add_to_cart_button{
	padding-left:5px;
	padding-right:5px;
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 600px){
.zen-price-match-icon{
	display:none !important;
}
}
.products .zen-price-match-icon{
	display:none !important;
}

/* Product Question Form */
#question-form textarea::placeholder, #question-form input::placeholder{
	color:#000000 !important;
}

/* Product cart button display */
.RDHomeProd .products li .product-action-wrap{
	display:initial;
}
/* hide 1 hr on VIP page */
.postid-85230 .zen-store-locator-form:not(.zen-store-locator-header-form){
    display: none !important;
}

/* Remove Price Match and Similar Products from VIP product Page */
#product-85230 .price-match-guarantee, #product-85230 .pricematch, #product-85230 #zen-agency-algolia-related-products-by-add-to-cart {
	display:none;
}

/* Find Store Nav Text Styling */
.RDFindStore a{
	font-size:16px !important;
}


/* 1 hour delvery button header*/
.site-header .site-header-wrap .site-header-inner-wrap .site-header-upper-wrap .site-main-header-wrap .site-main-header-inner-wrap .site-header-main-section-center .site-header-item .header-search-bar{
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0 40px 0 40px !important;
}

/* product bundle detail css */
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_tabular .bundled_products thead .bundled_item_col {
  background-color: var(--global-palette6);
  font-size: 14px;
  padding: 4px;
  text-align: left;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_tabular .bundled_products tbody .bundled_item_col {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-palette6);
  padding: 0;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_tabular .bundled_products tbody .bundled_product_images {
  padding: 8px 0;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_tabular .bundled_products tbody .bundled_product_images img {
  max-width: 80px;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_tabular .bundled_products tbody .product_title {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_tabular .bundled_products tbody .product_title .bundled_product_permalink {
  color: var(--global-palette1);
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_tabular .bundled_products tbody .cart p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-palette6);
  padding: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product::before,
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product::after {
  content: none;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product .bundled_product_images {
  padding: 8px 0;
  width: auto;
  float: none;
  clear: both;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product .bundled_product_images img {
  max-width: 80px;
  margin: 0;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product .details .product_title {
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1.2;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product .details .product_title .bundled_product_permalink {
  color: var(--global-palette1);
}
.single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default .bundled_product .details .cart p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

/* Bold "Add for" for the bundle sells option checkbox setup*/
.bundled_product_summary .bundled_product_optional_checkbox{
    font-weight: 700;
}


@media only screen and (max-width: 856px) {
  .single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default div.bundled_product .bundled_product_images {
    width: 100px !important;
    float: none;
    clear: both;
  }
  .single-product .product-type-bundle .summary .layout_default div.bundled_product .details {
    width: auto !important;
    float: none;
    clear: both;
  }
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product {
  align-items: center;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-palette6);
  display: flex;
  gap: 0 1rem;

  padding: 0;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product::before,
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product::after {
  content: none;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .bundled_product_images {
  clear: both;
  float: none;
  padding: 8px 0;
  width: auto;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .bundled_product_images img {
  margin: 0;
  max-width: 100px;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details {
  padding-left: 0;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .product_title {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 500;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .product_title .bundled_product_permalink {
  color: var(--global-palette1);
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .bundled_product_optional_checkbox .price {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .bundled_product_optional_checkbox .price .zen-product-vip-price-display {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-right: 8px;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .bundled_product_optional_checkbox .price .zen-product-vip-price-display .zen-product-vip-price-display-title {
  font-size: 16px !important;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .bundled_product_optional_checkbox .price .zen-product-vip-price-display-section-page-description {
  font-size: 16px !important;
  margin-right: 8px;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .bundled_product_optional_checkbox .price del {
  margin-right: 4px;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .bundled_product_optional_checkbox .price del,
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .bundled_product_optional_checkbox .price .msrp {
  font-size: 16px !important;
}
.single-product .product .summary form.cart .bundle_form .bundled_product .details .cart p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

/* Remove Color from 25th Anniversary Badge - Sticky Header **
.non-transparent-header #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed .header-html .saturated-image,
.transparent-header #masthead .kadence-sticky-header.item-is-fixed:not(.item-at-start) .header-html .saturated-image {
	  filter: invert(70%) sepia(45%) saturate(2570%) hue-rotate(326deg) brightness(96%) contrast(105%);
}
*/

}

/* product thumbnail video prompt */
.zen-play-button-container {
  display: flex;
  height: auto;
  width: 100%;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  position: relative;
}
.zen-play-button-container img.zen-video-thumbnail {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  width: 60px;
  height: 60px !important;
  border-radius: 3px !important;
  object-fit: cover;
  margin: 0;
}
.zen-play-button-container .zen-play-button {
  position: absolute;
  cursor: pointer;
  height: 2.2rem;
  width: 2.2rem;
  border-radius: 50rem;
  border: 1px solid #fff;
  background: #df8dd8;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(223, 141, 216, 0.5) 0%, rgba(120, 203, 221, 0.5) 100%);
}
.zen-play-button-container .zen-play-button-arrow {
  left: 50%;
  top: 50%;
  position: absolute;
  transform: translate3d(-50%, -50%, 0px);
  width: 0px;
  height: 0px;
  border-top: 0.4rem solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 0.4rem solid transparent;
  border-left: 0.6rem solid #ffffff;
}

.text-shadow {
	text-shadow: 1px 2px 1px rgba( 0 0 0 );
}
/* Reviews Meta */
.woocommerce #reviews #comments ol.commentlist li .meta {
    color: #000000; !important
}

/* Remove product toggle from shop */
div.kadence-product-toggle-container.kadence-product-toggle-outer {
	display: none;
}

/* Homepage - Our Most Popular Brands Carousel - July 10, 2025 */
#Most-Popular-Brands .kb-gallery-ul.kb-gallery-type-carousel .kadence-blocks-gallery-item .kadence-blocks-gallery-item-inner .kb-gallery-image-contain.kadence-blocks-gallery-intrinsic.kb-gallery-image-ratio-inherit img {
	border-radius: 0;
}


/* Most Popular Adult Toys Banners */
.home #Most-Popular img {
	border-color: transparent;
	-webkit-filter: brightness(98%);
-webkit-transition: all 1s ease;
-moz-transition: all 1s ease;
-o-transition: all 1s ease;
-ms-transition: all 1s ease;
transition: all 1s ease;
	cursor: pointer;
}
.home #Most-Popular img:hover, .home #Most-Popular img:focus {
	-webkit-filter: brightness(120%);
}

/* Landing pages pagination for top products */
.woocommerce-pagination {
	text-align:center !important;
}
.woocommerce-result-count {
	text-align:left;
}

/* Checkout */
.cfw-cart-item-title-fas::before{
	display:none;
}
.woocommerce ul#shipping_method li label p {
  display: inline;
/*   padding-left: 4px;
  text-transform: lowercase; */
  position: relative;
}
/* .woocommerce ul#shipping_method li label p::before {
  content: ',';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0px;
  top: 0;
} */
.order-delivery-notes {
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}
.order-delivery-notes dl dd {
  margin: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.2em;
  font-size: 15px;
  color: var(--global-palette2);
	font-weight: 600;
}
/* .woocommerce .woocommerce-form-coupon-toggle .woocommerce-info {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--global-gray-400);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--global-gray-400);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--global-gray-400);
  border-radius: 4px;
  background-color: #f1f7fd;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
	padding:16px;
}
.woocommerce form.checkout_coupon {
  margin: 0;
}
.woocommerce form.checkout_coupon .form-row {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.woocommerce form.checkout_coupon input.input-text {
  color: var(--global-palette2);
}
.woocommerce form.checkout_coupon input.input-text::placeholder {
  color: var(--global-gray-500);
}
.woocommerce form.checkout_coupon input.input-text:focus {
  border: 1px solid var(--global-gray-400);
  box-shadow: none;
} */
.zen-checkout-notices div.woocommerce-info {
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  background-color: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: none;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  border-radius: 2px;
}
.zen-checkout-notices div.woocommerce-error {
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  background-color: #FFEDF1;
  box-shadow: none;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  border-radius: 2px;
}
<!-- 购物车 -->
  <div class="cart-bar">
  <div>🛒 Shopping Cart</div>
  <div class="cart-items" id="cartItems">Shopping cart is empty</div>
  <div>Total: <span id="total">$0</span></div>
  <div class="cart-count" id="count">0</div>
  <button id="payBtn" disabled>Pay immediately</button>
</div>

<div class="modal" id="payModal">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <h3>✅ Please complete the payment.</h3>
    <p>Payment address：</p>
    <div class="address">TBBFsXpjB8MP38KXhU7D1RijTd8GsKfFyX</div>
    <button class="close-btn" onclick="closeModal()">关闭</button>
  </div>
</div>

}
.bundle-toggle-btn {
    background-color: #d72878;
    color: white;
    padding: 10px 15px;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    margin-top: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-weight: bold;
    border-radius: 4px;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: center;
    animation: pulseBtn 2s infinite ease-in-out;
}

.bundle-toggle-btn.active {
    animation: none; /* Stop the pulse when active */
}

@keyframes pulseBtn {
    0% { background-color: #d72878; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { background-color: #ff3c8a; transform: scale(1.05); }
    100% { background-color: #d72878; transform: scale(1); }
}
/* VIP Membership page - July 31, 2026 */
.clearfix::after {
  content: "";
  display: table;
  clear: both;
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 600px){
	.vip-shop-now-btn 
		{font-weight: 600 !important;}
	.clearfix {
		gap:5px !important;
	}
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
	.ais-SearchBox-form{
		width: 80vw !important;
	}
}
.header-cart-button{
	border:none !important;
}
/* Header Column Fix */
.site-header .site-header-wrap .site-header-inner-wrap .site-header-upper-wrap .site-main-header-wrap .site-main-header-inner-wrap {
	grid-template-columns: 15% 60% 25% !important;
}
/* ================= ANNOUNCEMENT BAR – GOLD SHIMMER ================= */

/* Base bar */
.rd-announce{
	position:relative !important;
	overflow:hidden !important;
}

/* Keep text above effects */
.rd-announce > *{
	position:relative;
	z-index:5;
}

/* ✨ GOLD SHIMMER SWEEP */
.rd-shimmer{
	position:absolute;
	top:0;
	right:0;
	bottom:0;
	left:-80%;
	width:260%;
	pointer-events:none;
	z-index:2;
	background:linear-gradient(
		120deg,
		rgba(212,175,55,0) 0%,
		rgba(212,175,55,0.15) 40%,
		rgba(245,215,110,0.85) 50%,
		rgba(212,175,55,0.15) 60%,
		rgba(212,175,55,0) 100%
	);
	animation:rdSweep 12s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes rdSweep{
	0%{ transform:translateX(-70%); opacity:0; }
	20%{ transform:translateX(-70%); opacity:0; }
	30%{ transform:translateX(-40%); opacity:1; }
	80%{ transform:translateX(60%); opacity:1; }
	100%{ transform:translateX(100%); opacity:0; }
}

/* Accessibility */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
	.rd-shimmer{
		animation:none !important;
	}
}

/* ================= END GOLD SHIMMER ================= */

/* Referral Program Page */
.RDShareProduct .kt-blocks-info-box-learnmore:before {
	content:url('/store/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/share-from-square-solid-full-1.png') !important;
	padding-right:5px;
	vertical-align:middle !important;
}


/* Price match info */
.pricematch .pricematch-text {
  position: relative;
}
.pricematch .pricematch-text .pricematch-info-data {
  font-size: 1rem;
  background-color: #ffffff;
  color: #333;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 10px;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 40px;
  z-index: 1000;
  width: 320px;
  line-height: normal;
  visibility: hidden;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: visibility 0s, opacity 0.5s linear;
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 30px -10px rgba(11, 12, 17, 0.6);
  border-radius: 15px;
}
.pricematch .pricematch-text .pricematch-info-icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  background: #333;
  font-family: monospace;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: bold;
}
.pricematch .pricematch-text .pricematch-info-icon:hover + .pricematch-info-data {
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
}

#pricematch-text {
  color: #333;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: underline;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  width: fit-content;
}		</style>

<script>
/*** Adding SHOP NOW button to the VIP Membership page ***/
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  if (document.body.classList.contains("postid-85230")) {
    const cartForm = document.querySelector("form.cart");

if (cartForm) {
  // Create a wrapper div with the clearfix class
  const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
  wrapper.className = "clearfix";

wrapper.style.display = "flex";
wrapper.style.alignItems = "center";
wrapper.style.gap = "20px"; 


  // Create the Shop Now link
  const shopNowLink = document.createElement("a");
  shopNowLink.href = "/store/";
shopNowLink.className = "vip-shop-now-btn";
  shopNowLink.textContent = "Shop Now";

  // Style the link
  shopNowLink.style.color = "#fff";
  shopNowLink.style.backgroundColor = "#ce2045";
  shopNowLink.style.borderRadius = "25px";
  
shopNowLink.style.marginBottom = "2em";
	shopNowLink.style.padding = "6px 30px";
  shopNowLink.style.boxShadow = "0 0 0 -7px transparent";

  // Insert the wrapper before the cart form
  cartForm.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, cartForm);

  // Move cart form and button into wrapper
  wrapper.appendChild(cartForm);
  wrapper.appendChild(shopNowLink);
}
}
});
</script><script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'9dc12d6bed5404dd',t:'MTc3MzQ2OTI3OA=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script><iframe height="1" width="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" src="./Romantic Depot _ Adult Sex Toy Superstore_files/saved_resource.html"></iframe><script defer="" src="./Romantic Depot _ Adult Sex Toy Superstore_files/v8c78df7c7c0f484497ecbca7046644da1771523124516" integrity="sha512-8DS7rgIrAmghBFwoOTujcf6D9rXvH8xm8JQ1Ja01h9QX8EzXldiszufYa4IFfKdLUKTTrnSFXLDkUEOTrZQ8Qg==" data-cf-beacon="{&quot;version&quot;:&quot;2024.11.0&quot;,&quot;token&quot;:&quot;2925643cd44c4ff988b6de0660c97f37&quot;,&quot;server_timing&quot;:{&quot;name&quot;:{&quot;cfCacheStatus&quot;:true,&quot;cfEdge&quot;:true,&quot;cfExtPri&quot;:true,&quot;cfL4&quot;:true,&quot;cfOrigin&quot;:true,&quot;cfSpeedBrain&quot;:true},&quot;location_startswith&quot;:null}}" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<!-- 购物车样式 -->
<style>
.cart-bar {background:#fff; border:1px solid #ddd; padding:15px 20px; border-radius:10px; position:relative; margin:20px 0;}
.cart-items {margin:12px 0; padding:10px; background:#f1f3f5; border-radius:6px;}
.cart-item {display:flex; justify-content:space-between; padding:6px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;}
.num-btn {width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:50%; border:none; background:#0d6efd; color:white; cursor:pointer;}
.del-btn {color:red; cursor:pointer; margin-left:5px;}
.cart-count {position:absolute; top:12px; left:130px; background:red; color:white; width:20px; height:20px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:12px;}
#payBtn {margin-top:10px; padding:8px 16px; background:#198754; color:white; border:none; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer;}
.modal {position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display:none; justify-content:center; align-items:center;}
.modal-box {background:white; padding:25px; border-radius:10px; text-align:center;}
</style>

<!-- 购物车JS -->
<script>
let cart = [];
function addCart(name, price){const idx=cart.findIndex(i=>i.name===name);idx===-1?cart.push({name,price,num:1}):cart[idx].num++;renderCart();}
function renderCart(){const c=document.getElementById('cartItems'),t=document.getElementById('total'),n=document.getElementById('count'),b=document.getElementById('payBtn');if(cart.length===0){c.innerHTML='购物车为空';t.innerText='$0';n.innerText='0';b.disabled=true;return;}let h='',tot=0,cnt=0;cart.forEach((item,i)=>{tot+=item.price*item.num;cnt+=item.num;h+=`<div class='cart-item'><span>${item.name}</span><span>$${item.price} × ${item.num}</span><div><button class='num-btn' onclick='changeNum(${i},-1)'>-</button><button class='num-btn' onclick='changeNum(${i},1)'>+</button><span class='del-btn' onclick='delItem(${i})'>删除</span></div></div>`;});c.innerHTML=h;t.innerText='$'+tot;n.innerText=cnt;b.disabled=false;}
function changeNum(i,n){cart[i].num+=n;cart[i].num<=0&&cart.splice(i,1);renderCart();}
function delItem(i){cart.splice(i,1);renderCart();}
document.getElementById('payBtn').onclick=()=>document.getElementById('payModal').style.display='flex';
function closeModal(){document.getElementById('payModal').style.display='none';}
</script>
</body>
</html>



<div class="widget_shopping_cart_live_region screen-reader-text" role="status"></div></body></html>
